category_sources: Official TypeDB README describes TypeDB as a database with TypeQL and a modern data model.
source_facts.description identifies TypeDB as a strongly typed database with a rich logical type system.
display_name_sources: Official TypeDB site and GitHub repository use TypeDB casing.
docs_sources: Official TypeDB site exposes dedicated documentation at /docs and reference documentation.
source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official TypeDB repository topics and README identify TypeQL, knowledge representation, strong typing, and database use.
source_facts.description says strongly typed database with a rich logical type system.
